title: No Welfare for the Wealthy Act of 2025
short_title: No Welfare for the Wealthy Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill changes the food stamp program to make the rules the same for everyone. Right now, some families can get food stamps by qualifying for other programs without having to meet all the income and savings rules. The bill says that all families must meet both the income limits and asset limits to get food stamps. These changes will start one year after the bill becomes law and will only affect people applying for new benefits.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Nutrition and Foreign Agriculture.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the No Welfare for the Wealthy Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Amendment
sections.text: This section changes part of the Food and Nutrition Act of two thousand eight. The change affects section five part a of that law. The new rule says that no household can receive food benefits unless they meet both the income limits and the resource limits that are described in other parts of the same law.

sections.title: Section 3 Effective Date and Application of Amendment
sections.text: This law will start working one year after Congress passes it, except for one special rule. The changes to food benefits will only apply to new benefit periods that start after the law takes effect. People who already have benefit periods that started before this law takes effect will not be affected by these changes during their current benefit period.
